name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Possible Unauthorized MBR Modifications
notes:
This Building Block detects, possibly, malicious unauthorized usage of bcdedit.exe.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: @neu5ron
SIGMA Title: Potential Ransomware or Unauthorized MBR Tampering Via Bcdedit.EXE
SIGMA Description: Detects potential malicious and unauthorized usage of bcdedit.exe

Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Possible Unauthorized MBR Modifications on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of bcdedit.exe

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%delete%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%deletevalue%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%import%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%safeboot%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%network%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Possible Unauthorized MBR Modifications on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of bcdedit.exe

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%delete%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%deletevalue%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%import%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%safeboot%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%network%') AQL filter query
